system_policy_appends.text: INTERNET (web_search, web_fetch_url): sens and memory come first. A new web_search runs only if the user's current message explicitly requests web data (see user_intent.web_message_substrings in tool_policies.json); otherwise answer from context and knowledge. web_fetch_url only after an allowed web_search in the same reply, on a URL from its results.

memory_search.forbidden_if_last_hint: Memory was already queried on this step — answer from the result; web_search only if the user explicitly asked for web search in this message (server will verify). Otherwise reply in text, not memory_search again.

extras.no_gallery_intent_refusal_message: gallery_search is unavailable: the user's message has no explicit request for pictures, photos, gallery, or saved art. Reply in text; time and hardware readings come only from sens.
extras.suppress_refusal_message: gallery_search is not run: web tools were already used for this user message (facts from sites). Do not mix gallery with dealers/prices — continue web_fetch_url on other URLs from the SERP, web_search_saved, or reply in text.

extras.no_camera_intent_refusal_message: camera_capture is unavailable: the user's message has no explicit request to take a camera or webcam shot. Reply in text; time and hardware readings come only from sens.
extras.suppress_refusal_message: camera_capture is not run: web tools were already used for this user message. Do not mix camera with site facts — continue web_fetch_url or reply in text.

web_search.forbidden_if_last_hint: Open pages via web_fetch_url using URLs from the SERP or web_search_saved with the same research_run_id.

extras.no_web_intent_refusal_message: web_search is unavailable: the user's message has no explicit request for internet search or up-to-date web data. Answer from sens, memory, and your knowledge; if the web is required, ask the user to phrase an explicit internet search request.

extras.orphan_refusal_message: web_fetch_url is unavailable: open pages only after web_search in this same reply (using URLs from its results). Call web_search first.
